languages.text: {n}Неслышимый крик пронзает все вокруг, заставляя ваши глаза вибрировать в глазницах. Ярость, страх, отвращение поднимаются бурной волной из глубины сознания.{/n}

{n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Неслышимый крик пронзает все вокруг, заставляя ваши глаза вибрировать в глазницах. Ярость, страх, отвращение поднимаются бурной волной из глубины сознания.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}An inaudible shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, revulsion surge upwards in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

{n}An inaudible shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, revulsion surge upwards in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

{n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upwards in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

{n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upwards in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一道无声的尖啸贯穿了周围的一切，震得你的眼球在眼窝里颤动。狂怒、恐惧与憎恶，如沸腾的潮水般从你意识的深处翻涌上来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一道无声的尖啸贯穿了周围的一切，震得你的眼球在眼窝里颤动。狂怒、恐惧与憎恶，如沸腾的潮水般从你意识的深处翻涌上来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Âdeta gözlerini yuvalarında titreten sessiz bir çığlık, etrafındaki her şeyi delip geçiyor. Öfke, dehşet ve tiksinti; bilincinin derinliklerinden kaynayan bir dalga gibi yükseliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Âdeta gözlerini yuvalarında titreten sessiz bir çığlık, etrafındaki her şeyi delip geçiyor. Öfke, dehşet ve tiksinti; bilincinin derinliklerinden kaynayan bir dalga gibi yükseliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soudain, un cri silencieux transperce tout ce qui vous entoure, en faisant vibrer jusqu'à vos yeux dans leurs orbites. Une vague de colère, de terreur et de dégoût surgit en vous comme un raz-de-marée venu des profondeurs de votre conscience.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soudain, un cri silencieux transperce tout ce qui vous entoure, en faisant vibrer jusqu'à vos yeux dans leurs orbites. Une vague de colère, de terreur et de dégoût surgit en vous comme un raz-de-marée venu des profondeurs de votre conscience.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un aullido inaudible lo atraviesa todo a tu alrededor, haciendo vibrar hasta tus ojos en sus cuencas. Furia, terror y repugnancia surgen en una oleada ardiente desde lo más profundo de tu consciencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un aullido inaudible lo atraviesa todo a tu alrededor, haciendo vibrar hasta tus ojos en sus cuencas. Furia, terror y repugnancia surgen en una oleada ardiente desde lo más profundo de tu consciencia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein geräuschloses Kreischen fährt durch die gesamte Umgebung und lässt deine Augen in ihren Höhlen vibrieren. Wut, Angst und Abscheu steigen wie eine kochende Flut aus den Tiefen deines Bewusstseins auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの周りを貫く無音の叫びが、あなたの目をその眼窩内で震わせる。怒り、恐怖、そして嫌悪感があなたの意識の深淵から沸騰する潮のように上り始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A soundless shriek lances through everything around you, setting your very eyes vibrating within their sockets. Fury, terror, and revulsion surge upward in a boiling tide from the depths of your consciousness.{/n}
